units.source_text: On 25 September 2024, HSBC Bank plc reached an agreement to transfer its business in South Africa to local lender FirstRand Bank Ltd. The
units.translation_target_text: 2024 年 9 月 25 日，汇丰银行达成协议，将其在南非的业务转让给当地银行 FirstRand Bank Ltd。
units.translation_zh: 2024 年 9 月 25 日，汇丰银行达成协议，将其在南非的业务转让给当地银行 FirstRand Bank Ltd。

units.source_text: The carrying amount of financial liabilities designated at fair value was $2,691m less than the contractual amount at maturity (2024: $4,365m less).

units.source_text: The carrying amount of financial liabilities designated at fair value was $1,161m more than the contractual amount at maturity (2024: $17m less).

units.source_text: The cumulative amount of change in fair value attributable to changes in credit risk was a loss of $430m (2024: $540m).
units.translation_target_text: 信用风险变化导致的公允价值变动累计损失为 4.3 亿美元（2024 年：5.4 亿美元）。

units.source_text: 1 Accruals, deferred income and other liabilities include $133.5bn (2024: $122.1bn) of financial liabilities, the majority of which are measured at amortised cost.
